title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's continued success in the ACC Tournament impacts their national ranking and tournament prospects.

title: Virginia Secures Win Against NC State in ACC Tournament
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeated N.C. State 81-. Malik Thomas scored 16 points, Thijs De Ridder added 15 points.
charlotte_impact: This win is crucial for Virginia's momentum and seeding in the upcoming NCAA tournament.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: Virginia faces NC State in a quarterfinal round matchup at the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.

title: NC State vs. Virginia ACC Tournament: Odds and Predictions
summary: The NC State Wolfpack meet the No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers in an ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte, North Carolina.

title: NCDMV Launches Real-Time Wait Time Tool
summary: North Carolina's new online tool helps residents find the best time and location to visit driver license offices, reducing wait times.
charlotte_impact: Improves customer service and reduces frustration for residents needing DMV services.

title: Suspect Accepts Plea Deal in North Charlotte Motel Killing
summary: Andre Poole will spend up to 4 years in prison for the killing of Howard Page at the Budget Inn on Old Interstate Road in June 2024.
charlotte_impact: Brings closure to a tragic case and highlights the consequences of violent crime.

title: Missing Lancaster Teen Found Safe
summary: The 14-year-old, last seen in the area of Meeting Street in Lancaster early Thursday morning, has been found safe.
charlotte_impact: Relief for the community and family after a stressful search for the missing teen.

title: Monroe Woman Wakes Up to Intruder in Bedroom
summary: A Monroe woman woke up to a stranger trying to remove her clothing; police are investigating the incident.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about home security and personal safety in the Monroe area.

summary: A suspect robbed someone at gunpoint outside a Belmont Lowe's, leading to a high-speed chase and serious crash on I-85.

title: Deadly Wrong-Way Crash in North Charlotte Claims One Life
summary: A wrong-way crash along Statesville Road, near Nevin Glen Road, on Tuesday night resulted in one fatality and two injuries.
